hero.title: Split Expenses, Not Friendships
hero.subtitle: The simplest way to share costs with friends, roommates, and travel companions. No more awkward money conversations.

heroSection.headline: Split expenses,
heroSection.subtitle: The smart way to track shared expenses with friends, roommates, and groups. Settle debts fairly with minimum transactions.

features.title: Everything you need to split fairly
features.subtitle: Built for simplicity. No ads, no premium tiers, no hidden costs. Just honest expense tracking that works.

items.groupSplittingDesc: Create unlimited groups for roommates, trips, or events. Everyone sees the same balances in real-time.
items.smartSettlementsDesc: Our algorithm calculates the minimum number of transactions to settle all debts. No more payment chains.
items.easyExpenseDesc: Add expenses in seconds with descriptions, categories, and custom splits. Split equally or by percentage.
items.qrInvitesDesc: Share a QR code to instantly add members to your group. No more typing emails or usernames.
items.notificationsDesc: Get notified when expenses are added or someone settles up. Stay on top of your group activity.
items.balanceDashboardDesc: See at a glance who owes what. Clear visualization of your financial position across all groups.

howItWorks.title: Three steps to fair splitting
howItWorks.subtitle: No complicated setup. No learning curve. Just straightforward expense tracking that anyone can use.

steps.step1Desc: Start a group for your roommates, trip, or any shared expense scenario. Give it a name and add members.
steps.step2Desc: Log shared expenses as they happen. Split equally or customize who owes what for each expense.
steps.step3Desc: When ready, see who should pay whom. Our smart algorithm minimizes transactions for easy settling.

testimonials.title: Loved by thousands
testimonials.subtitle: See what our users have to say about FairShare.

items.t1Text: Finally, no more awkward conversations about money. FairShare made splitting rent and utilities with roommates completely painless.
items.t2Text: We used it for our Europe trip with 6 friends. Everyone knew exactly what they owed, and settlements took minutes instead of hours.
items.t3Text: The smart settlement feature is genius. It figured out that only 2 payments needed to happen instead of everyone paying everyone.
items.t4Text: I've tried other apps but they're all so complicated. FairShare just works. Add expense, see balance, settle up. Simple.
items.t5Text: We use it for our weekly office lunches. Scan the receipt, split it, and everyone gets notified. So much better than Venmo requests.
items.t6Text: The QR code invite feature is so convenient. New roommate joined, scanned the code, and was immediately part of the household group.

stats.title: Trusted by thousands worldwide
stats.subtitle: Join a growing community of users who've simplified their expense tracking.

pricing.title: 100% Free. No catch.
pricing.subtitle: We believe expense tracking should be accessible to everyone. No premium tiers, no hidden fees, no ads.
pricing.footer: Free forever • No limits • No spam

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about FairShare.

items.a1: Yes, 100% free. No premium tier, no ads, no hidden fees. We believe expense tracking should be accessible to everyone.
items.a2: Instead of everyone paying everyone, FairShare calculates the minimum number of transactions needed to settle all debts. For example, if you owe Sarah $20 and Sarah owes Mike $20, you can just pay Mike directly. Fewer transfers, less hassle.
items.a3: Absolutely! You can split equally, by percentage, or specify exact amounts for each person. Perfect for when someone didn't order dessert or left early.
items.q4: What if someone owes me and I owe them?
items.a4: FairShare automatically nets out debts. If you owe Sarah $20 and she owes you $15, it shows you only owe $5. This happens automatically across all your groups.
items.a5: Yes. Your expense data is only visible to you and members of your groups. We never sell your data or show you ads based on your spending.
items.q6: Do I need everyone to have the app?
items.a6: Everyone who wants to see balances and add expenses needs an account, but you can track expenses on behalf of others. They'll get notified and can join when they're ready.

cta.title: Ready to split expenses fairly?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of users who've simplified their group expenses. Free forever, no credit card required.

footer.madeWith: Made with love for fair expense splitting
